name: runerigus
flavor_texts: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.
Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.
text: Runerigus is the Grudge Pokémon. It is a ground and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: wandering-spirit. Base stats — HP: 58, Attack: 95, Defense: 145, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 105, Speed: 30. Evolution line: yamask → cofagrigus → runerigus. Lore: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move. Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.
